name: E2E the passwordless front door
description: Expose the RESONANCE_FAKES fake-mail transport via peekLoginCode + a flag-gated GET /api/test/last-otp route; poll it with expect.poll for the OTP; fill the 'Digit N of 6' cells. Assert only settled state (getByRole/toBeVisible/toHaveURL), never mid-stream tokens.

name: Isolated E2E harness (ADR-0018 §4) replaces the RESONANCE_FAKES flag
description: The full-flow onboarding Playwright E2E stays deterministic + credential-free via ONE explicit, prod-hard-guarded harness — the sanctioned ADR-0018 §4 exception — NOT a general fakes flag or per-seam runtime branch. apps/web/lib/e2e-harness.ts is the SINGLE place a fake is selected: export const E2E_HARNESS = process.env.E2E_HARNESS === '1' && process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'. It exposes harnessModel(), harnessEmbedder() (=@resonance/ai/test createFakeEmbedder), and a MODULE-SINGLETON harnessMail() (=@resonance/auth/testing createFakeMail().port — one instance so the auth handler's send and peekLoginCode observe the same globalThis-registered codes buffer). @resonance/* packages stay live-by-default and UNTOUCHED. Composition roots each consult it with a single 'E2E_HARNESS ? harness : live' ternary at the shell boundary: interview/route.ts + actions.ts generateDraft (RunInput.model), commitProfile (embedder), and a new apps/web/lib/auth.ts getWebAuth() that builds an isolated createAuth({db:createDb(),mail:harnessMail()}) instance for the [...all] mount. getSession keeps using live getAuth() — correct because harness auth shares the same secret+DB (sessions validate) and no live mail send occurs. The deleted fake-of-a-fake is restored as @resonance/ai/test createFakeOnboardingModel — ONE MockLanguageModelV3 serving BOTH doStream (canned interview line) and doGenerate (forced proposeProfile tool-call, bio derived from the doGenerate prompt's first user turn) since harnessModel() is used at both roots. playwright.config webServer sets env {E2E_HARNESS:'1', BETTER_AUTH_SECRET:<fixed throwaway>} — needed because next dev is NODE_ENV=development where the auth-secret dev fallback is off. last-otp route + spec re-pointed to E2E_HARNESS; zero functional RESONANCE_FAKES refs remain. Boundary lint only blocks @resonance/*/src|dist, so /test + /testing subpaths and ai/test are fine to import from apps/web; next build keeps the test-util import server-side.
